blocked_claims: commenting, liking, following, messaging, publishing, uploading, deleting, or saving on Xiaohongshu
bulk crawling or pagination beyond this package contract
bypassing login, verification, or safety controls

blocked_now: submitting changes to an external site
claiming validation success as write success
storing live account or runtime state
requires_before_admission: Harbor target binding and evidence reference contract

deferred_until: a later Work Item authorizes true write package scope
explicit user confirmation flow is accepted
runtime target binding and completion evidence refs are accepted

must_reject_if: package declares submit, publish, send, delete, follow, like, upload, or save steps
package stores account state, live runtime state, raw evidence, production payload, or user business data

consumer_boundary: Core may read this file to fail closed on write-side claims. This file does not authorize Core, App, Harbor, or Lode to execute write behavior.
non_goals: No Core, Harbor, or App code change.
